Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water
Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: Weather is an unrelenting force, tearing through our lives and homes, with no regard for the human condition. But lucky for us, these humans have been conditioned to take out their phones and record whatever is happening, letting us relive the experiences again and again. And when it comes to weather that is out of the ordinary, that's truly where we come alive. Strap in, because you're about to get hit by an Extreme Weather Countdown.
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind
Extreme Weather Countdown | Dust Devils in the Wind

Video.summary: Brace yourself for unpredictable dust devils, mind blowing lightning shows, and glass shattering hail storms!
Video.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | What the Hail?

Image.alt: Extreme Weather Countdown | What the Hail?
Extreme Weather Countdown | What the Hail?
Extreme Weather Countdown | What the Hail?

Video.summary: Take a look at instances of nature that prove that we have no control over it.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Out of Control

Video.summary: Arctic winds, water vortexes, strange atmospheric changes, and intense heatwaves captured on camera.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Elements Collide

Video.summary: Take a look at instances of nature that prove that we have no control over it.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Out of Control

Video.summary: Arctic winds, water vortexes, strange atmospheric changes, and intense heatwaves captured on camera.
Video.title: Sinister Storms | Elements Collide

Video.title: Sinister Storms | Elements Collide

Video.summary: Following an intense hurricane season, Hurricane Michael is poised to hit Florida.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ferocity in Florida

Video.summary: Jaclyn Whittal and Mark Robinson are in Tornado Alley to track down some of the most ferocious weather.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Knowing the Enemy

Video.summary: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: One year after witnessing a record number of deadly twisters in Tornado Alley, Mark & Jaclyn return to the Midwest in search of more extreme storms. The hunt challenges their relationship with Mother Nature, as well as with each other.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: Following an intense hurricane season, Hurricane Michael is poised to hit Florida.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Ferocity in Florida

Video.title: Storm Hunters | Into the Core

Video.summary: While in Nepal, the Stormhunters receive unexpected news that literally takes this trip to the next level. They contend with mountainous terrain, adverse weather and altitude sickness in their quest to glimpse Earth's highest mountain.
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Height of Ruin - Part 2

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Height of Ruin - Part 2
Storm Hunters | Height of Ruin - Part 2
Storm Hunters | Height of Ruin - Part 2

Video.summary: Another chase through the hotbed of wicked weather puts the storm hunters a little too close to the danger zone. Will Mark & Jaclyn see the tornado they’re hoping for before it’s too late?
Video.title: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Image.alt: Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort
Storm Hunters | Too Close for Comfort

Video.summary: A narrow escape from a raging wildfire – a dramatic encounter with a mudslide - the jaw-dropping images of a flash flood – just some of the encounters with two of nature’s most destructive forces caught on camera in this Fire and Water episode.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Fire & Water

Video.summary: El Nińo is a temperature anomaly in the Pacific Ocean that affects weather patterns around the globe. In this episode we show some of the costly and deadly weather that can result when a Super El Nińo occurs.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo
Captured: Extreme Weather | Super El Nińo

Video.summary: Tornadoes; they are the embodiment of severe weather. In this episode we show some of the most terrifying weather caught on camera; from surviving a direct hit to a tornado in a typhoon.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Tornadoes

Video.summary: Humans are inclined to take the natural element of water for granted; until they witness its relentless power and destructive capabilities.
Video.title: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Image.alt: Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Captured: Extreme Weather | Power of Water

Video.summary: Even in the wilds of nature, everybody's a comedian.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.3

Video.summary: Some of Earth's smallest critters can make the biggest impact.
Video.title: WS Viral Wild | Ep. 1.8
